summary: Scheduled Game - Focused Game Tile Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON
AND the selected date has scheduled games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a scheduled game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the scheduled game time displays left-justified below the match-up header in the game tile
AND below the scheduled game time, the pitching match-up displays "Probable Pitcher Hidden" for the away and home probable pitchers
*******BELOW FEATURES HAVE NOT BEEN IMPLEMENTED YET*******
AND below the pitcher match-up, call letters for the available live feeds are displayed
